assert_return i8x16.max_u-i8x16.popcnt v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:08080808080808080808080808080808
assert_return i8x16.popcnt-i8x16.max_u v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:08080808080808080808080808080808
assert_return i8x16.avgr_u-i8x16.avgr_u v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:01010101010101010101010101010101 v128:02020202020202020202020202020202 -> v128:02020202020202020202020202020202
assert_return i8x16.avgr_u-i8x16.max_u v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:01010101010101010101010101010101 v128:02020202020202020202020202020202 -> v128:02020202020202020202020202020202
assert_return i8x16.avgr_u-i8x16.max_s v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:01010101010101010101010101010101 v128:02020202020202020202020202020202 -> v128:02020202020202020202020202020202
assert_return i8x16.avgr_u-i8x16.min_u v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:01010101010101010101010101010101 v128:02020202020202020202020202020202 -> v128:01010101010101010101010101010101
assert_return i8x16.avgr_u-i8x16.min_s v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:01010101010101010101010101010101 v128:02020202020202020202020202020202 -> v128:01010101010101010101010101010101
assert_return i8x16.avgr_u-i8x16.abs v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:01010101010101010101010101010101
assert_return i8x16.abs-i8x16.avgr_u v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:80808080808080808080808080808080
assert_return i8x16.avgr_u-i8x16.popcnt v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:04040404040404040404040404040404
assert_return i8x16.popcnt-i8x16.avgr_u v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:01010101010101010101010101010101
assert_return i8x16.abs-i8x16.popcnt v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:08080808080808080808080808080808
assert_return i8x16.abs-i8x16.abs v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:01010101010101010101010101010101
assert_return i8x16.popcnt-i8x16.popcnt v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:01010101010101010101010101010101
assert_return i8x16.popcnt-i8x16.abs v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:01010101010101010101010101010101
